creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On CURRENT (FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #0 r281371: Fri Apr 10 17:43:37 CEST 2015 amd64) several ports with .xz-compressed  tarballs fail, for instance the ports x11-toolkits/gtk30, x11-toolkits/gtk20 and others with the following error:

[...]
===>  Cleaning for gtk3-3.14.12
===>  License LGPL20 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for gtk3-3.14.12
===>   gtk3-3.14.12 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by gtk3-3.14.12 for building
===>  Extracting for gtk3-3.14.12
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gnome3/gtk+-3.14.12.tar.xz.
gtk+-3.14.12/configure: Lzma library error: Corrupted input data
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
*** Error code 1
